content: THIS IS YOUR LAST TIC TAC TOE BOARD.

👑 4/6: <@1071686976283082782>
<@99950645313798144> hi can u check my dm? need to confirm something

Kind of the opposite for me

Because there is no BOTW's "You can climb anywhere" level design in this game <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
every gacha games with open world: genshit copy
just show that Hoyo is that powerful
i played genshin and mostly cuz of scummy Hoyo + bad pull income
but well yeh i can understand people have that mindset
open world, grind stuff, grind endgame gear, gather materials
They should have leaned more into the factory stuff
Why copy boring farm stages from genshin instead of just making it with the factory
It would still be time gated
if they make factory too complicated
ok so my opinion is not that relevant anymore
i played AK early launch days too, the core problem of AK that the earlygame is too hard + too tedious, people were being scared away
but it is successful cuz AK is argubly one of the best TD games in the market
but doesnt ignore the fact earlygame is so hard + so tedious
I don't expect the factory to be that complicated
little chest finder is so cute
i see what u did there
The exp falls on that lvl
I didnt even notice 67 until its mentioned

i think we are getting to the era where
- play any games u refer
- fuck other's opinion/backseat
if u find genshin your fav games, good for you
what is thaty pog team bro
but its all the hot men (and catcher)
he should go into a hole
The fucking 2nd level for the ranger operator promotion mats
the problem of making the game too hard
it will sack the "mainstream" gacha game
I dont really understand why people who aren't into the factory stuff wouldn't just play genshin or wuwa instead
i played all endfield wuwa gi
so u can spend hours making this <@298922504259502081>
I'm afraid this might crash my laptop if I attempt it
cuz they want to make everything comform to their taste
I only just reached Power Plateue and got hit by a lot of side quest
played it for them too.. for now i'll sleep until they release new male character in what? 6 months? 😔

I'm afraid you'll be waiting for longer <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184> 

Or not, there's at least one male already teased and it's a Sankta.

bruh this is like saying botw is genshin copy
genshin being open world , 3d is NOT a hoyo original idea

I now have an urge to play factorio again but I don't think I have enough time <:dead:1356082627509092372>
Sure but they copied spiral abyss for the endgame
They copied the shitty no sweep farming stages
I think no sweep farming is just arknights originals <:Nymphaea_frustrated:1459078117485445288>

At least you can auto in AK (finally)
After too many years and sweep is only in annihilatio
Also why would you say botw is a ganshin copy when botw came out first lol
Anyway i guess ill just keep doing low level mat stages so i can afk while my team clears them <:Okayge:1285347570453053470>
It has a timed 2 teams mode doesn't it

We will know what end game for endfield is in 11 days i think
Oh maybe im jumping to conclusions then <:Brown_think:1459080117308620996>
I still wish i could just level up without having to go pick a bunch of fucking mushrooms though

Theres an event that got named "challenge event" coming in 11 days so if its like og arknights it could be just CC <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184> we might need more than one tema but nobody knows
The mushroom will be pretty obsoleted soon
they need to remove the restrictions of having a power source to use zipline
i only use ziplines set up by friends n shit

The power source is pretty annoying lol
i like the first guy a lot

I figured i would try the original AK

also this probably won’t persuade you to redownload

but 3 stars only need LMD to tier up and you’re expected to use them a lot to start off
I didnt realize it was locked to your roster
But thats just more xp mats you have to farm later <:dead:1356082627509092372>
that’s like my biggest gripe with AK
At least those actually drop though i guess <:KEKW:629740073977380882>
you can reasonably spend up to 1-1.5 weeks get a 6 star to E2 lv. 1 (no levels or module)
Feels like it would be better to just buy an account at that point
wouldn’t blame you if you did
There's a reason why there are plenty of accounts in Arknights being sold
I think ill just not bother, but i looked out of curiosity
I feel like its never worth actively trying to get into a gacha
gambling never is good for you
Yeah, by virtue of them being Gachas
Timesink + can eats up your money (if you're a player that pays for packs)
Plus you're basically going out of your way to rot your brain
am I the only one that gets freaked out by people having 4 ears in endfield?
No i find that a little weird too
putting me off by those designs sooo hard...
i mean... just make normal people or furry ears...
To each their own, I also get freaked off by animalistic humanoid designs to a point. I could handle Mountain and that one hot tiger lady from ZZZ just fine but like some are just hard to

They got very upset for me comparing Kemonomimi (animal eared people) to furries
This absolute behemoth of a man
